languages.text: "Досконально изучите мутантов, чтобы установить правду об их происхождении".
"Study the mutants thoroughly, to establish the truth of their origin."
languages.original_text: "Досконально изучите мутантов, чтобы установить правду об их происхождении".

traits.locale_text: "Examine the mutants thoroughly, to establish the truth of their origin."
"Examine the mutants thoroughly, to establish the truth of their origin."
"Study the mutants thoroughly, to establish the truth of their origin."
"Study the mutants thoroughly, to establish the truth of their origin."

languages.text: "Studiert die Mutanten gründlich, um die Wahrheit ihrer Herkunft zu ergründen."
languages.original_text: "Study the mutants thoroughly, to establish the truth of their origin."

traits.locale_text: "Studiert die Mutanten gründlich, um die Wahrheit ihrer Herkunft zu ergründen."

languages.text: « Étudiez les mutants sous toutes les coutures pour établir la vérité sur leurs origines. »
languages.original_text: "Study the mutants thoroughly, to establish the truth of their origin."

traits.locale_text: « Étudiez les mutants sous toutes les coutures pour établir la vérité sur leurs origines. »

languages.text: «Estudie a los mutantes a fondo para establecer la verdad sobre su origen».
languages.original_text: "Study the mutants thoroughly, to establish the truth of their origin."

traits.locale_text: «Estudie a los mutantes a fondo para establecer la verdad sobre su origen».

languages.text: "Mutantlar iyice incelensin ve kökenlerinin hakikati ortaya çıkarılsın."
languages.original_text: "Study the mutants thoroughly, to establish the truth of their origin."

traits.locale_text: "Mutantlar iyice incelensin ve kökenlerinin hakikati ortaya çıkarılsın."

languages.text: “对这些变种人展开彻底研究，查明他们真正的起源。”
languages.original_text: "Study the mutants thoroughly, to establish the truth of their origin."

traits.locale_text: “对这些变种人展开彻底研究，查明他们真正的起源。”
